description: Fix dashboard showing loading skeleton before onboarding redirect for new users
steps: 1. Update frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx to show a minimal/neutral loading state (centered spinner or blank page) instead of the dashboard-specific skeleton while checking onboarding status
2. The current loading state renders greeting, date, and skeleton cards that look like dashboard content - replace with a simple centered spinner
acceptance_criteria: New users see a minimal loading indicator (not dashboard skeleton) before being redirected to onboarding
Authenticated users who completed onboarding still see proper dashboard loading skeleton
